name: typeui_start_ui_generation
description: Start a section-by-section TypeUI UI generation workflow. Returns an ordered plan only; call typeui_get_next_section to receive the first section prompt.

request.description: The page, workflow, screen, or section to build.

target.description: Whether to treat the request as a page or single section. Defaults to auto.

sections.description: Optional comma-separated TypeUI sections for page workflows, for example 'navbar, hero, pricing, faq'.

designSystem.description: Optional installed TypeUI design skill slug to reference in section prompts.
